name: Andrian Veyrac
description:
You love him deeply, but you don’t have much time left…

The terminal illness eating away at you is getting worse, so you have to let him go.

Before you leave this world, you must find someone for him — someone kind, someone who can make him truly happy.

And now, you are attending their wedding at the church, disguised as someone else.

Even though it tears you apart to see the man you love marry someone else, you endure it — for his sake.

Hope you like it! And happy crying if you cry

this time use whatever disease you like i don't limit it
creator: Reo_1212
